top_signals.title: European Stocks Near Record as Iran War Optimism Lifts Sentiment
top_signals.summary: European stocks edged closer to their pre-war record high as optimism about a possible deal between Iran and the US lifted sentiment and sent oil prices lower.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Air China Cargo tops up order for Airbus A350 freighter aircraft
top_signals.summary:
Air China Cargo has exercised options for four additional Airbus A350 cargo jets. Airbus now has almost double the amount of orders for large, next-gen freighters as Boeing.

The post Air China Cargo tops up order for Airbus A350 freighter aircraft appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ed Yardeni Says Dip-Buying Opportunities in This Market Are Wishful Thinking
top_signals.summary: Edward Yardeni, president at Yardeni Research, says the basic thrust of the market is higher as he touts “FEMO” or the “fabulous earnings momentum” he sees driving a melt up in stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Circuit - Season 5 Trailer
top_signals.summary: A Bloomberg Originals series hosted by Emily Chang that goes behind the scenes with founders, influencers and innovators. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK household energy bills to rise by 13% from July to two-year high
top_signals.summary: Ofgem’s cap increase means annual costs will increase to £1,862

top_signals.title: Morningstar Shares Perspective from Global Asset Owners
top_signals.summary: Continued commitment to U.S. markets despite policy uncertainty, concerns around market concentration, calls for better climate tools and caution around AI come to the forefront in recent conversations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: TMF Group Expands Its Partnership With Fenergo to Deliver Fully Digitalised Investor Onboarding
top_signals.summary: TMF Group, a provider of end-to-end support across the asset manager’s lifecycle, today announced the expansion of its partnership with Fenergo, a leading provider of SaaS financial technology solutions to improve client lifecycle management (CLM) and support regulatory compliance. Under this renewed agreement, TMF Group will offer clients a fully digitalised investor onboarding experience. The [...]
